message:
ui(appstore): add 'gist' link on every substrate card

Each App Store card now exposes three nav links in its footer:
  ADR-XXX ↗   →  the canonical decision record
  gist ↗      →  the 2,500-3,500-word deep narrative companion (NEW)
  research/ ↗ →  the working notes / spec corpus

The deep gists landed across iters 20 and 25 (10 total), but the
App Store had no path into them — operators reading the marketplace
saw the ADR + research/ but not the gist that explains the substrate
in narrative form. Closes the discoverability loop.

Wired to existing files in docs/gists/:
  rvDNA      → docs/gists/rvdna-v2-deep.md
  ruQu       → docs/gists/ruqu-v2-deep.md
  gcs (155)  → docs/gists/datalake-layer-deep.md  (the datalake gist
                covers the full backend-adapter family of which gcs
                is the reference impl)
  ipfs       → docs/gists/ipfs-backend-deep.md

Verified by full smoke (7 routes, 5 audit codes, 0 console errors)
plus a focused agent-browser eval that confirmed all 4 cards render
'gist ↗' in the expected footer position.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
